highlights.title: Intel knows it needs to ‘leapfrog’ ARM and AMD, says CEO Lip-Bu Tan
highlights.description: Chipzilla changes PC biz name to reflect belief edge and robots could be as valuable one day

highlights.title: Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI reassigned to new judge
highlights.description: Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI has been reassigned to U.S. District Judge Edward Davila, replacing the magistrate judge initially assigned to the case. Here are the details.

highlights.title: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers
highlights.description: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.

highlights.title: SK Hynix, Samsung and Kioxia Face Pivotal Earnings Test on AI Swings
highlights.description: SK Hynix Inc. and Samsung Electronics Co. are set to test investor appetite for memory chips as South Korea’s stock market — now a bellwether for global AI sentiment — grapples with violent swings driven by leveraged chip bets.

highlights.title: Google is expanding access to its Gemini Spark agentic AI assistant
highlights.description: Gemini Spark is now available to more users.

highlights.title: European researchers want to study social media’s harms but can’t get the data
highlights.description: EU law gives researchers unprecedented rights to scrutinize Big Tech. Researchers say Tik Tok, X, and Meta are still deciding who gets to look inside.

highlights.title: Bitcoin holds near $65,000 as $800 billion AI selloff leaves crypto largely untouched
highlights.description: The Magnificent Seven had their worst day since April 2025 after Alphabet and Tesla spooked investors on AI spending. Bitcoin fell less than 1%, and dogecoin led the majors lower.

highlights.title: Amazon cracks down on use of AI images by sellers after New York law
highlights.description: A recently enacted New York law mandates that companies disclose when an ad includes a "synthetic performer" in place of a human actor.

highlights.title: Top Environmental Fund Sees Japan Key to AI Energy Challenge
highlights.description: Asia’s best-performing environmental fund has increased exposure to Japan as it expects the nation’s technology sector to prove increasingly pivotal in solving the artificial intelligence industry’s surging power demands.

highlights.title: Apple art director shares early sketches and prototype of Lil’ Finder Guy
highlights.description: Sofia Coelho, the art director who led the visual design and concept for Lil’ Finder Guy, has shared a rare behind-the-scenes look at how the MacBook Neo campaign’s mascot came to be. Here are the details.

ai.title: Pickleball comedy ‘The Dink’ premieres on Apple TV
ai.description: Apple TV subscribers can now watch ‘The Dink,’ the platform’s new star-studded sports comedy produced by Ben Stiller. Watch the trailer below.

ai.title: Google meets the neighbors and gets both barrels over its new UK datacenter
ai.description: The Reg was there as locals aired grievances over poor communication, noise, and light pollution at Waltham Cross facility

ai.title: Microsoft fiber foul-up cut off Azure California for almost five hours
ai.description: Maintenance mistake caused immediate issues and took out 27 services

regulation.title: Google breaks Alibaba’s record for Europe’s largest DMA fine
regulation.description: €890 million slap – just 0.25% of revenue – for making itself the subject of search results, and hiding app store alternatives
